title: rosa pouzinii subsp. jacetana
intro: Rosa pouzinii subsp. jacetana, also known as the Rosa jacetana, is a fragrant, climbing rose plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Rosa pouzinii subsp. jacetana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
